text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While stopping by the dance studio to pick up
something I forgot, I see an enthralled Haru Urara
practicing by herself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Aaand, all done! Ah, this really takes me back!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, when I was small, I used to sing and dance
in my family's workshed.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, the memory suddenly popped into my
head while I was dancing! My family made me a
microphone out of a stick and everything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And, and! The day I started this school, they
made me a huge banner saying "You can do it!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They even promised they'd bring it to my concert.
I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So, I gotta practice real hard! I can't let them
down!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, right! I should get back to dancing then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara fervently begins practicing again. She
occasionally gets the lyrics wrong, but she's got
the spirit, and it's a good performance.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, what do you think? You think they'll like it?
choice_data_list: It'll be even better if you memorize the lyrics!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I thought so! I was worried there for second.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But then I pictured that "You can do it!" sign and I
knew I had to give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm really gonna sing and dance my heart out for
the real thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She jubilantly continues to practice and later
gives a truly heartfelt live performance.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! Sometimes I do forget the words.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But if I memorize all of them, it'll be a
super-duper great show!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And then I'll really wow the audience! Heehee!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna do my best to memorize them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She nails the lyrics and vocal inflections, and the
live performance turns out absolutely wonderful.
